race.description: McGrath Estate Agents Showcase 3YO+ Super Mdn Hcp
race.comment: REIGN 'EM IN (2) improving filly who drops back a level after finishing in the minor money at both starts on the provincial circuit. Stuck on well with the 57kg to finish a close-up third over 900m at Newcastle. Will take catching from the low gate. WON'THEARMECOMING (4) smart filly who resumes from a lengthy break. Kept safe in betting on debut with a fighting second over 900m at this track last October. Ran third in a recent 745m trial at Randwick. Shapes as the main danger. SAMMY THE BULL (3) comes here with a fitness edge over the bulk of these fourth-up. Chipped away late from the sticky gate with a plugging third over 1000m at Gosford. This looks easier and not without each way claims. LOVE YOU ANYWAY (9) finished runner-up at her last four starts and gets a key jockey change today on the quick back-up. Taken to the front and showed a ton of grit with a close-up second over 1007m at Taree. Sure to be thereabouts.
